title: Touch 3: Capability Deck Generation
description: Walk through the complete Touch 3 capability deck workflow: capability area selection, structure-driven assembly, and the full 3-gate HITL review with a lowfi refine demo.

steps.narration: Navigate to the Touch 3 Capability Deck page for the Meridian Dynamics deal. This is where you build a detailed deck showcasing specific capability areas relevant to your prospect.
Start by selecting the capability areas that matter most to this deal. For Meridian Dynamics, we will choose Cloud Infrastructure, Data Analytics, and Security.

callout.text: Select areas relevant to this deal

steps.narration: With capability areas selected, the AI begins assembling a structure-driven deck. It maps each area to dedicated slide sections with targeted messaging.
The skeleton gate shows the proposed deck structure organized by capability area. Each section has dedicated slides mapping to the selected areas: Cloud, Data, and Security.

Notice how the structure maps capabilities to deck sections. Cloud Infrastructure gets migration and IaC slides, Data Analytics gets platform and BI slides, and Security gets zero trust and compliance slides.
After approving the skeleton, the AI generates draft content for each capability slide. Review the content blocks to ensure they match Meridian's needs.
Zoom in on the Cloud Infrastructure slides. The draft content covers migration methodology, cost reduction metrics, and infrastructure automation capabilities.
Let's refine the capability content. The lowfi refine is especially powerful here because it lets you sharpen the messaging for each capability area before final production.
The refined content now includes Meridian-specific references, more precise technical details, and stronger value propositions for each capability area.
Compare the refined slides. Notice the personalized references to Meridian's AWS environment, client engagement data, and service boundaries throughout.
After approving the refined content, the AI produces the final polished capability deck with section-specific color coding and full brand treatment.
The final deck is stunning. Each capability section has its own accent color while maintaining overall brand consistency. Cloud in blue, Data in purple, Security in red.
Your capability deck is complete and saved to Google Drive. Eight slides covering three capability areas, fully personalized to Meridian Dynamics and ready for presentation.
